title: cerastites hybridus
intro: Cerastites hybridus, also known as Lavatera maritima or Sea Lavender, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the Malvaceae family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Cerastites hybridus include treating skin conditions such as eczema and acne, as well as reducing stress and anxiety. The herbal preparations of this plant include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to make teas, salves, and other medicinal products.
